title: Inside Hailey Bieber’s Saint Laurent Bag | In the Bag? | Vogue
description: Nietzsche and Eau d’Nepo fragrance connoisseur Hailey Bieber sits down with Vogue to rifle through her fabulous Saint Laurent shoulder bag, and shows off all the things she totally uses in her everyday life. First off, the Vogue cover star doesn’t go anywhere without her Rhode lip treatment (just a bottle or two). After flipping through the blank pages of her life’s thoughts and ideas, Hailey shuffles through her burner phones, brings out an Erewhon smoothie, and reveals the secret formula that
